body_txt: Faith can do amazing things to a person. Even the worst villain can redeem themselves after gaining a little bit of faith in God . A Heel–Faith Turn is a situation where a villain turns good because of a deep religious experience, possibly preceded by a My God, What Have I Done? moment or a Heel Realization . As a result, the former villain often becomes a Good Shepherd and/or Badass Preacher and an Atoner . The title is a pun on Heel–Face Turn , directly inspired by Faith–Heel Turn , which is this trope's opposite. Compare Easy Evangelism . Subtrope of Turn to Religion . noreallife
